about: The model is trained on synthetic Customer -> CustomerProfile, Order -> LineItem records. Customer profiles are optional, orders are exchangeable child sets, and each order has its own exchangeable line-item set.
Scenario buttons select concrete root records and show how the recursive score decomposes into local parent likelihood, child-count likelihood, child-row subtree likelihood, and any auxiliary terms.
Child summaries are used only as structure-learning and context hints in this export. They are not scored as likelihood terms.

queryModel.description: Browser-side query model compiled from learned root h-regime, h-conditioned child-count, z-state, and h/z child-context SPN factors.
supportedSemantics: child count exact or lower-bound evidence
at-least-k matching child rows under exchangeable iid child rows
recursive nested child-set predicates composed from parent-context and child-count SPN factors
